# HeptaCert — Full Reference for AI Systems

HeptaCert is an end-to-end event management platform (an "event operating system")
covering the full event lifecycle: registration, QR check-in and attendance,
automated and verifiable digital certificates, email campaigns, CRM, learning
paths, accreditation/CPD, analytics, a public training marketplace, a REST API,
and an MCP server for AI agents. Built by Heptapus Group for Turkish and global
organizations. Primary language Turkish; full English interface.

This file is the extended companion to /llms.txt. It adds the plan/feature matrix,
integration catalog, API surface, and AI-agent (MCP) details.

## Canonical URLs

- Home: https://heptacert.com/
- Discover hub: https://heptacert.com/discover
- Public events: https://heptacert.com/events
- Organizations: https://heptacert.com/organizations
- Training marketplace: https://heptacert.com/marketplace
- Certificate verification: https://heptacert.com/verify
- Developer portal & API docs: https://heptacert.com/developers
- Business pricing: https://heptacert.com/pricing/business
- Contact: https://heptacert.com/iletisim
- AI agent endpoint (MCP, Streamable HTTP): https://heptacert.com/mcp

## Plans & Feature Matrix

HeptaCert has four plans. The free Starter tier has no cost; Professional, Growth,
and Enterprise are paid. Pricing is in Turkish Lira (TRY) and may change — always
check /pricing/business for current numbers. Higher tiers include everything in the
tiers below them.

- **Starter (Free)** — certificate verification, basic template editor, public
  profiles, community access. Includes a one-time HeptaCoin welcome credit.
- **Professional** — paid event operations: QR check-in, ticketing, bulk
  certificates, custom registration forms, ready-made certificate templates, and
  branding/watermark removal. Monthly HeptaCoin quota.
- **Growth** — everything in Professional plus marketing and scale: email
  automation, audience segmentation, advanced analytics, webhooks, custom domains,
  full API access, presentations, raffles, and lead-capture forms. Larger quota.
- **Enterprise** — everything in Growth plus organization-grade capabilities:
  team/collaborator management, event CRM, enterprise integrations, LMS, training
  compliance, accreditation, scheduled reports, SSO, kiosk mode, and platform
  health. Unlimited HeptaCoin quota; custom pricing.

"HeptaCoin" is the internal usage credit consumed by certificate issuance and
hosting. Paid plans receive a recurring monthly quota; Enterprise is unlimited.

## Core Modules (detail)

### Event & Registration
Multi-step event wizard; custom registration forms with conditional fields,
document uploads, and approval workflows; participant management with bulk
import/export; ticket types and capacity; public event pages and a discovery hub.

### QR Check-in & Attendance
Session-level QR attendance; live operations screen for gate staff; offline-capable
mobile check-in; attendance matrix export; minimum-sessions rule for certificate
eligibility.

### Digital Certificates (automated)
Branded generation from custom templates; automatic issuance triggers (attendance
confirmed, quiz passed, learning path completed); public verification page + QR (no
login); CPD/credit-hour stamping; bulk generation and email delivery; Apple Wallet
passes.

### Email & Automation
Bulk campaigns with branded templates; open/click/delivery tracking; trigger-based
drip sequences (registered, attended, certificate issued, tag added) with
delay + action steps (send email, add tag, call webhook).

### CRM
Contact profiles with full event/certificate history; corporate accounts; deal
pipeline (Lead → Qualified → Proposal → Won/Lost); activity timeline; segments and
tags; embeddable lead-capture forms (iframe).

### Quiz & Assessment
Multiple-choice, true/false, open-ended; configurable passing score and attempt
limits; timed assessments; automatic scoring; certificate trigger on pass.

### Learning Paths
Ordered sequences of events/courses with prerequisites; enrollment and completion
tracking; required vs optional steps; per-step minimum score overrides.

### Accreditation & CPD
Supported bodies include MYK, TMMOB, SMMM, TÜRMOB, YÖKAK, EMO, TOBB. Org-level
accreditation records with validity tracking; event-level CPD hours; member CPD
transcripts (total and by-body, exportable).

### Marketplace
Organizations publish training programs for public discovery; category/price/free
filters; Course structured data for rich results.

### Analytics & Reporting
Organization overview (certificates, events, members, engagement); training
compliance heatmap; CRM funnel; learning-path completion funnels; scheduled PDF
reports (daily/weekly/monthly).

## Integration Catalog

- **Messaging/Notifications:** Slack (Incoming Webhooks), Microsoft Teams (Adaptive
  Cards), WhatsApp Business (Meta Cloud API / 360dialog), Twilio SMS.
- **Data sync:** Google Sheets, Microsoft Excel (OneDrive/SharePoint).
- **Calendar:** Google Calendar (two-way venue reservation sync).
- **CRM/Marketing:** HubSpot, Salesforce, Mailchimp/Brevo.
- **Automation:** Zapier, Make, and custom HTTPS webhooks (HMAC-SHA256 signed).
- **Identity:** OIDC SSO (Entra ID, Okta, Google Workspace).
- **Webinar:** Zoom, Microsoft Teams webinar attendance import.
- **Document storage:** Google Drive / SharePoint archive.
- **Analytics/BI:** Power BI, Looker Studio.
- **LMS:** Moodle, Canvas.
- **Accounting (Turkey):** Logo, Paraşüt, Mikro.
- **Payments:** iyzico, PayTR, Stripe (one active at a time).

New connectors are managed from Admin → Integrations. Secrets are encrypted at rest
and masked after saving.

## Developer API

- REST over HTTPS, Bearer token auth (keys start with `hc_live_`).
- Granular scopes: events, certificates, attendees, CRM, analytics, forms, reports
  (each read/write).
- Rate limits by plan: ~60 rpm Starter, ~300 rpm Growth, ~1000 rpm Enterprise.
- Interactive docs and key management at /developers.

## MCP Server (AI Agent Access)

HeptaCert exposes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server so AI agents can operate the
platform directly.

- Endpoint: https://heptacert.com/mcp (Streamable HTTP transport).
- Auth: per-request `Authorization: Bearer hc_live_...` header (API key from the
  admin dashboard). Scopes from the key are enforced per tool.
- Tooling: ~44 tools across events, attendees, sessions, certificates, check-in,
  automation rules, webhooks, analytics, and LMS — read and write.
- Safety: destructive tools (delete event, remove attendee, revoke certificate,
  delete session) require an explicit confirm step; every write is recorded in the
  agent audit log.
- Local/stdio mode is also supported (e.g. Claude Desktop) using the
  HEPTACERT_API_KEY environment variable.

## Audience

Event organizers and event companies; corporate training and HR/L&D teams;
professional associations and chambers; universities, student clubs, academic
organizers; certification/accreditation bodies; developers embedding registration
or certificate issuance.

## Key Technical Facts

- Multilingual (Turkish primary, English).
- Custom domain + white-label portals.
- KVKK (Turkish data protection) compliant; 2FA with backup codes; role-based
  access control (admin, manager, viewer).
- Offline-capable QR check-in.
- PostgreSQL with Alembic migrations; Redis-backed async job queue; Docker-ready.

- Platform contact: https://heptacert.com/iletisim
- Developer support: contact@heptapusgroup.com
- Publisher: Heptapus Group — https://heptapusgroup.com
